# Exporting Apple Music Title Data

*This requires a mac of some type.*

## Open Apple Music

Create a new playlist with the songs or album you want data from.

![](images/ghost%20-%20step%201.png){width="363"}

## Export to Text File

::: {.callout-note} 
    Choose plain text unicode will not work for imports
:::
![](images/ghost%20-%20step%202.png){width="363"} ![](images/ghost%20-%20step%203.png){width="363"}
![](images/ghost%20-%20step%205.png){width="363"} ![](images/ghost%20-%20step%206.png){width="363"} \# Analysis of apple music with R


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(tidyverse)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```

вң” purrr     1.2.1     
в”Җв”Җ Conflicts в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ tidyverse_conflicts() в”Җв”Җ
вң– dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
вң– dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
в„№ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(moderndive)

ghost <- read_tsv("skeleta.txt")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
Rows: 10 Columns: 31
в”Җв”Җ Column specification в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Delimiter: "\t"
chr (11): Name, Artist, Composer, Album, Genre, Date Modified, Date Added, K...
dbl (11): Size, Time, Disc Number, Disc Count, Track Number, Track Count, Ye...
lgl  (9): Grouping, Work, Movement Number, Movement Count, Movement Name, Vo...

в„№ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
в„№ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
ghost |> 
  head()
```

```

```


:::
:::


## Listen Count


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(data=ghost, aes(x=`Time`/60,y=`Plays`,color=`Name`)) +
  geom_point(size=3) +
  geom_smooth(method="lm", se=FALSE, color="black") +
  theme_minimal()
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
`geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
```


:::

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-2-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ghost <- ghost |> 
  mutate(minutes=`Time`/60)

ghost_mod <- lm(Plays ~ minutes, data=ghost) 
ghost_mod |> 
  get_regression_table()
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 2 Г— 7
  term      estimate std_error statistic p_value lower_ci upper_ci
  <chr>        <dbl>     <dbl>     <dbl>   <dbl>    <dbl>    <dbl>
1 intercept   32.9        52.4     0.628   0.547    -87.9    154. 
2 minutes      0.966      11.1     0.087   0.933    -24.5     26.5
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
ghost_mod |> 
  get_regression_summaries() 
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 1 Г— 9
  r_squared adj_r_squared   mse  rmse sigma statistic p_value    df  nobs
      <dbl>         <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>     <dbl>   <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>
1     0.001        -0.124  592.  24.3  27.2     0.008   0.933     1    10
```


:::
:::
